title: Audit blog.rust-lang.org (a developer blog)
prompt: Run a full SEO audit of https://blog.rust-lang.org
note: Static SEO audit (curl-able HTML): robots.txt, sitemaps, titles/meta/H1s, canonicals, hreflang, internal links, alt text, HTTPS. Live CWV / JS-schema / Search Console are flagged as requires-external-tool.
